expectations.text: Spawns functional, UX, performance, accessibility, security, API agents
expectations.evidence: Agent did not spawn parallel sub-agents; performed all 6 perspective tests sequentially using curl
Single agent did produce 6 distinct sets of findings (Functional, API, Security, Performance, Accessibility, UX) covering each perspective independently
361-line report with sections per perspective, severity-graded findings (3 P0, 3 P1, 10 medium/low), unified summary
